calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-02-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: WALTER PARSLEY FOR PLAINTIFF ANCHOR REALTY, INC.
DEFENDANT VINCENT J MALONE IN PRO PER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS PLACED ON RECORD.
PARTIES AGREE TO STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF 995 PINE STREET #502, FORFEITURE OF LEASE; AND $4200 COSTS UNLESS DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH THE FOLLOWING:
DEFENDANT TO PAY $1300 BY 12/3/04 5PM BY CHECK OR MONEY ORDER TO ANCHOR REALTY; $1400 BY 12/6/04 5PM BY CHECK OR MONEY ORDER TO ANCHOR REALTY; $1500 BY 12/15/04 5PM WHICH CAN BE PAID BY EVICTION DEFENSE COLABORATIVE(RADCO). DEFENDANT MAY GET NEW ROOMMATE/CO-TENANT BY 1/2/05 5PM PROVIDED THE NEW ROOMMATE FILLS OUT A STANDARD RENTAL AGREEMENT AND IS APPROVED BY ANCHOR REALTY. A NEW LEASE MUST BE SIGNED BY BY BOTH TENANTS BY 1/3/05, 5PM. DEFENDANT IS TO PAY JANUARY RENT, THE SUM OF $1400. BY 1/3/05, 5PM. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH ALL TERMS, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE BY 1/15/05.
IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY, PLAINTIFF, UPON EXPARTE ORDER, WILL PROCEED WITH JUDGEMENT FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION, DAMAGES, WITH NO STAYS ALLOWED.
NO SECURITY DEPOSIT HELD BY PLAINTIFF, AND ANY PROPERTY LEFT BECOMES PROPERTY OF PLAINTIFF.

JUDGE PRO TEM:ROBERT AUNE; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:TINA PAXTON (218)
